summary: Video set to music with no speech. White all-caps text 'THE DEPORTATIONS WILL CONTINUE' is held over blue sky with drifting clouds. Partway through, a white jet with 'GLOBAL' lettering climbs into frame behind the text, then clears the frame and the text returns.

script.scene: Bold white all-caps title 'THE DEPORTATIONS / WILL CONTINUE' centered over bright blue sky with soft drifting clouds; slow cinematic motion, music bed.
Same slogan held; clouds continue to drift, sky deepening blue.
A white deportation jet with 'GLOBAL' lettering climbs into frame behind/through the text as it takes off, partially obscuring the slogan.
Plane clears frame; 'THE DEPORTATIONS WILL CONTINUE' slogan resolves crisp again over open blue sky.
Final hold on the slogan over clouds, ending the loop.

notable_text: Day or night, ICE Air remains filled and fueled
